technical_preview.notes: The operator explicitly authorized a public technical preview on 2026-07-22. It may publish automated, synthetic, deterministic evidence only. It is not a production validation or final release verdict.

truth_data.notes: The 36 repository candidates remain synthetic-agent-authored drafts pending genuine human authorship or review.

practitioner_review.notes: No practitioner review is claimed in the technical preview.

multilingual.notes: Public quality claims are English-only. The exploratory French fixture is excluded from quality claims.
